name: Dried Beef and Noodle Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 can Cream Of Mushroom Soup (10 3/4 oz)
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large pot, cook the chopped onion in water until softened.
2. Add the uncooked noodles and bring to a boil; simmer until al dente.
3. Drain the noodles and stir in the cream of mushroom soup (10 3/4 oz).
4. Stir in milk and water until combined.
5. Add the dried parsley flakes and shredded cheddar cheese, stirring to combine.
6. Pour the mixture into a baking dish, top with additional cheese if desired, and bake at 375°F for about 20 minutes or until bubbly and golden.
